markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic content planning session between Outset and GrowthX to develop a comprehensive SEO content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog traffic represents 80% of Outset's website traffic, with a 50/50 split between mobile and desktop (higher CTR on mobile)](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [62 keyword-based content assignments identified across 9 content clusters, focusing on the customer journey](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage high-volume "internship" related keywords, despite not offering internships directly](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Need to improve mobile page load speed (currently 4.6s for First Contentful Paint, 9s for Largest Contentful Paint)](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)

## Topics

### Current Website Performance

  - [Blog represents 80% of traffic](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [50/50 split between mobile and desktop traffic](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Mobile has higher click-through rate (CTR)](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Some uncertainty about whether parents or students are primary researchers](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Technical SEO Issues

  - [Mobile page speed needs improvement (4.6s First Contentful Paint, 9s Largest Contentful Paint)](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Main hero image loading slowly on mobile](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Recommendation to optimize image format (possibly use WebP instead of JPG)](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)

### Content Strategy Development

  - [9 content clusters identified, mimicking customer journey](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [62 keyword-based assignments created](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Clusters include:](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
    1.  Discovering healthcare through summer camp
    2.  Exploring healthcare careers
    3.  Gaining real-world experience
  - [Using Airtable for content planning and management](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Incorporating search volume and keyword difficulty metrics from SEMrush](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)

### Content Optimization Tactics

  - [Focus on comprehensive guides for competitive keywords](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
  - [Use listicles and numbered titles (e.g., "8 reasons you should be a pediatrician for teens")](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Include "for teens" or "for high schoolers" in titles to target audience](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Create content ecosystems with related articles to keep users engaged](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [Potential to scrape "People Also Ask" questions for content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### Leveraging "Internship" Keywords

  - [High search volume for internship-related terms](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [Outset doesn't offer internships but can create content to capture traffic](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [Potential for location-specific internship articles (e.g., "Best medical internships for teens in Charlotte, North Carolina")](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [Include disclaimers and CTAs to Outset's programs in internship-related content](https://fathom.video/share/PV8mxoMV6qrpawaspqWVTsL4fGKVB9my?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)

## Next Steps

1.  Lawson to review content clusters and assignments in Airtable
2.  Team to select collaboration articles for development
3.  GrowthX to begin content creation and send for thorough review
4.  Lawson to provide feedback to calibrate voice and style
5.  Explore opportunities for physician-written content and alumni stories
